prose:
Frontier-orbital gap of molecular oxygen (O₂)
Method provenance:
1. Property: HOMO–LUMO energy gap (Koopmans-type, α/β-averaged)
2. Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` ≡ B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density-fitting (RIJK) in PySCF 2.x
3. Geometry provenance: fixed experimental O₂ bond-length geometry supplied by user (file: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz); no additional optimization – this is a single-point orbital calculation (DFT//exp-geometry)
4. Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation)
5. Charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state); unrestricted KS treatment
6. Software: chemkit frontier-orbitals skill → PySCF backend (SCF converged in 7 cycles; total electronic energy −150.38872 Ha ≡ −4092.2855 eV)
7. Convergence & warnings: SCF converged; no warnings reported by engine. All integrity checks passed (integrity.trustworthy = true).

Headline result (from tool output):
HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV
  • HOMO energy  = −8.8739616 eV
  • LUMO energy  = −3.5859031 eV

Reproducibility:
• Command issued (from cli_invocation):
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 3 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8ztyot3r/live.json
• Output JSON: /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8ztyot3r/live.json
• The live SCF/DFT log was streamed during execution to the autogenerated .out file announced by chemkit at launch (tail this file for full SCF details).

No experimental comparison is offered; ask if you would like a literature value verified.
